collection_method: read-only GitHub CLI repository metadata via gh repo view
scope: Current source-backed infrastructure scan for the agent-company platform lane. No browser, account, API/model, payment, wallet, public-action, or real-money action was performed.

decision_summary.control_plane: Keep SQLite/company ledger as source of truth.
decision_summary.runtime_policy: Use agent frameworks as adapters, not as the top-level company control plane.
decision_summary.near_term_build: Create approval-safe service request execution plans for read-only service requests before adding more autonomous infrastructure.
decision_summary.money_lane_implication: Digital product direct-download route remains the best near-term lane because local product, manifest, and listing readiness artifacts already exist; marketplace/legal/payment gates are still closed.

repos.description: A lightweight, powerful framework for multi-agent workflows
repos.platform_use: Static/sandbox adapter first; model-backed execution remains behind model/API service approval.

repos.platform_use: Typed local/TestModel adapter remains useful for offline worker contracts.
Static graph adapter and orchestration pattern; not the ledger/control plane.

repos.platform_use: Later interop layer for independent agent applications after local packet/ledger contracts stabilize.
Candidate for approved service-job durability after repeated service executions exist.
Lightweight Python durable workflow candidate if DB-backed service execution grows beyond CLI rows.

repos.platform_use: Managed workflow candidate after service request lifecycle has enough repetition to justify deployment.

service_gate_state.next_required_approval_family: browser_read_only_session plus legal/KYC/tax/payment review for marketplace routes
